This is a new channel, Onboard It. Basically, it's this: Steph and I both belong to Opus Dei. Currently in India, there is an Opus Dei center in Mumbai and in Delhi. We don't have an official center in Goa, but Father comes once a month. Every other month is for a recollection, that's an Opus Dei type of term.

So he meets with me and some other priests and the bishop maybe because we're trying to have a stronger presence in Goa. That's the basics of it. There are recollections every other month. There are what are called circles. These could be online, could be in person. I'm trying to start in-person circles in Goa. Occasionally annual retreats and stuff like that.

Right now only in Mumbai. We want to start hosting events and things like that so that there's more Opus Dei presence in Goa

arguments.content:
# #opus-dei

Opus Dei coordination and planning for Goa presence.

## Context

- Gerson and Steph are members of Opus Dei
- Official centers in Mumbai and Delhi; no official center in Goa yet
- Father visits Goa monthly (every other month is a recollection)
- Working on stronger Opus Dei presence in Goa with local priests and bishop

## Activities

- **Recollections** — every other month when Father visits
- **Circles** — can be online or in-person; working on starting in-person circles in Goa
- **Annual retreats** — currently only in Mumbai

## Goals

- Start in-person circles in Goa
- Host events to build Opus Dei presence in Goa
- Coordinate with Father, local priests, and bishop

## Participants

- Gerson
- Steph

content.text:
# #opus-dei

Opus Dei coordination and planning for Goa presence.

## Context

- Gerson and Steph are members of Opus Dei
- Official centers in Mumbai and Delhi; no official center in Goa yet
- **Father Kevin D'Souza** (based in Mumbai) visits Goa regularly twice a month; every other month is a recollection. Sometimes exceptions occur, or he may visit for specific needs.
- Working on stronger Opus Dei presence in Goa with local priests and bishop

## Activities

- **Recollections** — every other month when Father visits
- **Circles** — can be online or in-person; working on starting in-person circles in Goa
- **Annual retreats** — currently only in Mumbai

## Goals

- Start in-person circles in Goa
- Host events to build Opus Dei presence in Goa
- Coordinate with Father, local priests, and bishop

## Participants

- Gerson
- Steph

In-person circles can be held in houses, as we used to do in Canada. There's no need for a fancy venue. If there's an Opus Dei center available, the circles can be held there, but in Goa, where there’s no center, we can use houses. My house is available, and Louis, who is in the south, can also host when he’s not busy. This gives us one house in the north and one in the south, which should be sufficient for in-person circles.

The next step is to discuss this with Father Kevin. I can either send him a message or bring it up during our next conversation. It would be helpful to create an agenda list for topics to discuss with him. Some matters can be addressed via WhatsApp text or voice messages, while others may require face-to-face meetings or phone calls. However, phone calls are rare since Father Kevin is very busy and usually initiates them himself. This plan should work for organizing Opus Dei circles.

# Agenda for Father Kevin D'Souza

Topics to discuss with Father Kevin. Mark with [x] when addressed.

## Communication Preferences

- **WhatsApp text/voice** — most matters
- **Face-to-face** — during Goa visits
- **Phone calls** — rare; Father Kevin initiates

---

## Topics

### In-Person Circles in Goa
- [ ] Propose using houses for circles (like Canada model)
- [ ] Offer Gerson's house (north Goa) as venue
- [ ] Mention Louis' house (south Goa) as option when available
- [ ] Get Father Kevin's input on format/frequency

### March 24-26 Visit
- [ ] Consulate appointment booking (Wed Mar 25, 9:00 AM)
- [ ] Recollection planning?
- [ ] Other visit logistics

---

## Completed

*(Move items here once discussed)*

---

## Notes

*Add any relevant notes after conversations with Father Kevin*

Father Kevin mentioned needing to book the Consulate appointment for Wednesday morning (Mar 25). Has he confirmed the booking yet, or should I add a reminder to follow up with him before the visit?

Answering the previous two questions:

To build a stronger Opus Dei presence in Goa through events, we have a couples program that consists of a series of eight or nine sessions. We held two of them last year, but then there was a big break. One of the things we could do is continue that series and hold the next one, which would be the third iteration of the program.The other thing is that Father Kevin himself has suggested some other programs they have in Mumbai that we can also have here. I don't even know what those programs are called, but we can put this on the agenda for when I meet Father Kevin next to discuss it.

We also need to organize a retreat. Normally, these retreats are held in Delhi and Mumbai twice a year, but we could possibly organize one in Goa. This would be for the men and for the boys (I think aged 15 and above). 

One thing to note in your main Opus Dei notes is that there are separate programs for men and women. They never have joint programs for both, with the exception of the couples program. For the regular things—like circles, recollections, and retreats—these are always kept separate.

In terms of Father Kevin's appointment, I don't have to book it myself (he has to book it), but it is something I can bring up with him a week before that date. I'll touch base with him then to plan his trip, as he should be here for a couple of days and I will definitely need to meet him while he is in town.

Lastly, we sometimes have an extra car, so we can give him a vehicle to drive around. I will make sure someone is available to handle the airport pick-ups and drops for him. I should be coordinating all of those details one week before he arrives.

arguments.newText:
## Context

- Gerson and Steph are members of Opus Dei
- Official centers in Mumbai and Delhi; no official center in Goa yet
- **Father Kevin D'Souza** (based in Mumbai) visits Goa regularly twice a month; every other month is a recollection. Sometimes exceptions occur, or he may visit for specific needs.
- Working on stronger Opus Dei presence in Goa with local priests and bishop

**Important:** Programs are separate for men and women (circles, recollections, retreats). Only exception is the couples program which is joint.

# Agenda for Father Kevin D'Souza

Topics to discuss with Father Kevin. Mark with [x] when addressed.

## Communication Preferences

- **WhatsApp text/voice** — most matters
- **Face-to-face** — during Goa visits
- **Phone calls** — rare; Father Kevin initiates

---

## Topics

### In-Person Circles in Goa
- [ ] Propose using houses for circles (like Canada model)
- [ ] Offer Gerson's house (north Goa) as venue
- [ ] Mention Louis' house (south Goa) as option when available
- [ ] Get Father Kevin's input on format/frequency

### March 24-26 Visit
- [ ] Consulate appointment booking (Wed Mar 25, 9:00 AM)
- [ ] Recollection planning?
- [ ] Other visit logistics

---

## Completed

*(Move items here once discussed)*

---

## Notes

*Add any relevant notes after conversations with Father Kevin*
